programme.desc: Filmmaker Brett Morgen explores the Nirvana frontman's childhood, career and tragic death, using material from the Cobains' personal archives. Documentary, featuring Kurt Cobain.

programme.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
programme.desc: Part two of two. The singer-songwriter reflects on his complicated reunion with his absent father and reveals why he chose to reinvent himself time and time again.

programme.title: Kings of Coke
programme.desc: How a gang of Irish bank robbers from Montreal rose to become one of North America's most feared criminal organisations.

programme.title: Queen of Speed
programme.desc: A look at the career of French driver Michele Mouton, charting her battle to rise to the top of the male-dominated world of rallying in the 1970s and '80s.

programme.title: My Icon: Rachel Yankey
programme.desc: The England football star looks at some of the inspirational figures that have had an impact on her career.

programme.title: Discovering: Ryan Gosling
programme.desc: The story of the life and career of Ryan Gosling, known for his roles in The Notebook, La La Land, Drive, First Man and Barbie.

programme.title: Discovering: Leonardo DiCaprio
programme.desc: A profile of the American actor, who rose to fame through his roles in Romeo + Juliet and Titanic, and won a Best Actor Oscar for The Revenant.

programme.title: Discovering: Kate Winslet
programme.desc: The life and career of the Oscar-winning English actress, who starred in Sense and Sensibility and Titanic and has been Oscar-nominated seven times, winning for The Reader.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of American film-maker Nancy Meyers, known for The Parent Trap, The Holiday and Something's Gotta Give.

programme.title: I Am Raquel Welch
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the life of a trailblazing actress who not only redefined the idea of a Hollywood sex symbol, but also led the way for modern-day action heroines.

programme.title: Paul Simon: In Restless Dreams
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary exploring the 60-year career of the singer-songwriter, from his partnership with Art Garfunkel to the global success of his 1986 LP Graceland, as he returns to the studio to record his 2023 album Seven Psalms.

programme.title: Paul Simon: In Restless Dreams
programme.desc: Conclusion of the documentary exploring the 60-year career of the singer-songwriter, looking at his return to the studio to record his 2023 album Seven Psalms.

programme.title: Elvis Presley: The Searcher
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary about the singer, beginning with his early life in Tupelo, Mississippi, and his unprecedented rise to fame over a single year.

programme.title: Elvis Presley: The Searcher
programme.desc: Conclusion of the documentary about the singer, beginning with his return home after his discharge from the army, and how he dealt with a rapidly changing pop scene.

programme.title: Lancaster
programme.desc: The story of the legendary bomber synonymous with the Dambusters, the night raids against Germany and the brave men and women who made them possible.

programme.title: The Essex Murders
programme.desc: Documentary about the killing of three notorious criminals known as the Essex Boys, who were found shot to death in December 1995. Friends and fellow gangsters reveal how the gang and their leader Tony Tucker managed to build a drug empire as the rave scene took off.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Lizzie Daly sets off on the final leg of her journey to where Australia's desert meets the Indian Ocean, confronting challenges of survival on the way and diving with tiger sharks and manta rays.

programme.title: Shark Squad
programme.desc: A look at how sharks are more complex and intelligent than generally believed, and not simply mindless eating machines prone to attacking humans.

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Montana-based chef, Eduardo Garcia, loves pizza, so he's inviting friends over for a make their own pizza party; he greets his guests with homemade dough, red sauce, wild nettle sauce and a host of toppings that they use to build their own pies.

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Chef Eduardo Garcia's got New York on his mind so he invites friends over for an everything bagel, jalapeno schmear, potato latkes and smoked trout salad brunch that's reminiscent of NYC, but freshly-caught and flavor-packed with Montana ingredients.

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Chef Eduardo Garcia invites his twin brother to a dinner for two he knows they both love; he makes a family favorite, crispy roast chicken in one pot with Yukon gold potatoes, along with a honey mustard dressed salad and a chamomile crème brûlée.

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Chef Eduardo Garcia turns appetizers into a dinner for friends, sharing wild venison carpaccio with foraged greens, papas bravas served with an aioli and a chimichurri, sweet and spicy grilled shrimp adobada and bittersweet chocolate truffles.

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: It's crew mealtime and Chef Eduardo Garcia's firing up the wok and hosting his work team for a Thai-inspired feast of pungent oyster Mushroom Larb and decadent Duck Pad Thai before breaking out a big batch of Mango Sticky Rice Coconut Popsicles.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Vermont family finally finds their dream spot on Lake Champlain.

programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy LA lives with a quiet vacation home along Lake Tuscaloosa; they find a property with great potential and are ready to take on the renovations, but it may prove to be more work than expected.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: After selling their lake house in Indiana, a couple from Apollo, Pennsylvania searches for a weekend getaway closer to home; Lake Erie offers the perfect mix of convenience and charm with great food and wine.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation

programme.desc: An Atlanta couple fight budget restraints as they seek the perfect vacation home for their blended family in Jackson Lake, Ga.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond; Chase and the team expand it to accommodate the next generation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A man and his fiance would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons; they'd also like to pay homage to their funeral home business.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Rooney family spends their summer with relatives and friends on Great Pond, but their camp is too small, and it's so dark that they can barely tell they're on a lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters step in to rescue a family's camp that's sinking due to the stream running underneath it; with $60,000 and a tight timeline, the team must work quickly to winterize and lift the structure.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The masters remodel a 1960s cabin that needs more living space, but there's a catch: they can't build outside of the original footprint.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
